data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Crew count and subcontractor tracking'. While the use case provides evidence of crew counts for different teams (Concrete team: 6, Rebar crew: 4, Crane operator: 1), it lacks any mention or evidence of subcontractor tracking. This absence indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as subcontractor tracking is explicitly stated as a need in the linked use case.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
